title: Joy to the World
alternateTitles: Joy to the World! The Lord Is Come
firstLine: Joy to the world! the Lord is come; let earth receive her King
tuneAttribution: Tune: ANTIOCH, arr. Lowell Mason, 1836, from G.F. Handel.
publicDomainBasis: Isaac Watts (1674–1748), Lowell Mason (1792–1872). Text published 1719. Both public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
Verse 2
Verse 3
sections.text:
No more let sins and sorrows grow,
Nor thorns infest the ground;
He comes to make His blessings flow
Far as the curse is found,
Far as the curse is found,
Far as, far as, the curse is found.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
He rules the world with truth and grace,
And makes the nations prove
The glories of His righteousness,
And wonders of His love,
And wonders of His love,
And wonders, wonders, of His love.
